text.title: Work Breakdown Structure Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping WBS state to a rule.

conclusion.verdict: rename verb-led elements; move verbs to schedule

branch.when: noun_led_all == true AND hundred_percent == true AND leaf_size_violation == true
noun_led_all == true AND hundred_percent == true AND leaf_size_violation == false AND dictionary_complete == false
noun_led_all == true AND hundred_percent == true AND leaf_size_violation == false AND dictionary_complete == true AND orphan_nodes > 0
noun_led_all == true AND hundred_percent == true AND leaf_size_violation == false AND dictionary_complete == true AND orphan_nodes == 0

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: noun_led_all=true, hundred_percent=true, leaf_size_violation=false, dictionary_complete=true, orphan_nodes=0 → accept WBS.
